name: CEX/DEX Spread Scanner - MEXC Futures vs Jupiter Solana

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ scanned_at: $('Calculate Spreads').first().json.timestamp, tokens_compared: $('Calculate Spreads').first().json.tokens_compared, alerts_count: $('Calculate Spreads').first().json.count }) }}

={{ $('Calculate Spreads').first().json.spreads.map(s => ({ scan_id: $json[0].id, scanned_at: $('Calculate Spreads').first().json.timestamp, symbol: s.symbol, mint: s.mint, mexc_price: s.mexc_price, jup_price: s.jup_price, spread_pct: s.spread_pct, abs_spread_pct: s.abs_spread_pct, direction: s.direction, exchanges: 'MEXC Futures/Jupiter' })) }}
